summary: Saracataninb does not promote oncogenesis; it inhibits metastasis in liver cancer models by targeting SRC/FAK/STAT3 pathways without affecting primary tumor growth or inducing carcinogenic activity. Evidence indicates no association between saracatinib use and tumorigenesis or mutation induction, supporting its classification as an anticancer rather than pro-carcinogen drug.
